items.title_en: Move over, seltzer. Non-carbonated drinks are taking the spotlight
items.title_zh: 移过去，苏打水。非碳酸饮料成为人们关注的焦点

items.desc_zh: Surfside 和 BeatBox 等非碳酸酒精饮料正在抢走硬苏打水的“喉咙份额”，尤其是在 Z 世代中。

items.title_en: Stephen Colbert returns to TV in appearance on local Michigan station

items.desc_zh: 红十字会表示，他们被认为是在疫情爆发之前就感染了病毒。

items.title_en: U.S. and Iran are closing in on a 60-day ceasefire extension with nuclear framework, FT reports
items.title_zh: 据英国《金融时报》报道，美国和伊朗即将在核框架下延长 60 天停火

items.desc_zh: 自 4 月 8 日以来，脆弱的停火已经生效，美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡争夺时不时发生小规模冲突。

items.desc_zh: 该公司列出了五只股票，这些股票在六月及以后还有很大的上涨空间。

items.title_en: French pair held until trial after boys abandoned by road in Portugal

items.desc_en: The couple, who allegedly left two young boys on a roadside in the south of Portugal, will remain in custody, a court rules.

items.title_en: Stock market returns are often subpar after a strong 3-year streak, history shows
items.title_zh: 历史显示，在连续三年强劲表现后，股市回报率往往低于平均水平
items.desc_en: While the market has posted solid double-digit returns in the past three years, investors shouldn't get their hopes up that the trend will continue.
items.desc_zh: 尽管市场在过去三年中取得了稳定的两位数回报，但投资者不应抱有这种趋势将持续下去的希望。

items.title_en: Americans are feeling inflation's pinch into the holiday weekend. Here's where prices are rising the most
items.title_zh: 美国人在假期周末感受到通货膨胀的压力。这里是物价涨幅最大的地方
items.desc_en: Prices related to travel, recreation and food saw particularly steep increases, stretching Americans' wallets as they celebrate the unofficial start of summer.
items.desc_zh: 与旅行、娱乐和食品相关的价格上涨尤其剧烈，在美国人庆祝夏季非正式开始之际，他们的钱包捉襟见肘。

items.desc_zh: 英伟达的最新预测表明，它仍然认为对中央处理器的长期需求很大。

items.title_en: High fuel prices test limits of summer vacation spending
items.title_zh: 高油价考验暑假消费极限
items.desc_en: The unofficial start of the summer travel season on Memorial Day weekend will show just how much travelers want to fly and how much they're willing to pay.

items.title_en: ‘Blue dot fever’? What's really behind a tricky summer dynamic for live music
items.title_zh: “蓝点热”？夏季现场音乐的棘手动态背后的真正原因是什么
items.desc_en: As prices rise everywhere, consumers are choosing to be more intentional with how they're spending on live music and concerts this year.
items.desc_zh: 随着各地物价上涨，消费者今年在现场音乐和音乐会上的支出变得更加谨慎。

items.title_en: Watch China launch Shenzhou 23 astronauts to its Tiangong space station on May 24 - Space
items.title_zh: 5月24日，中国将神舟二十三号宇航员送入天宫空间站 - 太空
items.desc_en: Watch China launch Shenzhou 23 astronauts to its Tiangong space station on May 24  SpaceChina to send astronaut on year-long space mission as it eyes 2030 moon landing  ReutersFinal countdown: Shenzho
items.desc_zh: 观看中国于 5 月 24 日将神舟二十三号宇航员送入天宫空间站 中国航天将派宇航员执行为期一年的太空任务，着眼于 2030 年登月 路透社最终倒计时：神舟

items.title_en: At least 90 dead in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
items.title_zh: 官方媒体报道中国煤矿爆炸至少90人死亡
items.desc_en: The explosion took place at 19:29 local time on Friday at a coal mine in northern China.
items.desc_zh: 当地时间周五19时29分，中国北方一煤矿发生爆炸。

items.title_en: Rubio visits India to sell energy as Iran oil shock persists
items.title_zh: 伊朗石油危机持续，卢比奥访问印度出售能源
items.desc_en: The top US diplomat has made statements offering to support India’s energy needs - but should Delhi give in?
items.desc_zh: 美国最高外交官发表声明，表示愿意支持印度的能源需求，但德里应该屈服吗？

items.title_en: From decades to years - AI could speed search for brain drugs hiding in plain sight
items.title_zh: 从几十年到几年——人工智能可以加速寻找隐藏在视线中的大脑药物
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望这项工作将有助于找到负担得起的、有效的药物来治疗 MND 等疾病。

items.title_en: SignalLEMO - Ai Outreach Made Simple
items.title_zh: SignalLEMO - Ai Outreach Made Simple
items.desc_en: AI-powered lead outreach for field service contractors
items.desc_zh: 由人工智能驱动的现场服务承包商的领先外展

items.title_en: Disney's 'Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu' tallies lowest Thursday preview sales in franchise history
items.title_zh: 迪士尼《星球大战：曼达洛人和格罗古》周四预览销量创下系列历史最低纪录
items.desc_en: Disney's "Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu" tallied $12 million in Thursday night previews, the lowest collection of advanced tickets in franchise history.
items.desc_zh: 迪士尼的《星球大战：曼达洛人和格罗古》在周四晚上的预演中票房收入为 1200 万美元，这是该系列电影历史上预售门票收入最低的一次。

items.title_en: Here's the case for 9,000 on the S&P 500 by the middle of next year, according to JPMorgan
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，到明年年中，标准普尔 500 指数将出现 9,000 点的情况
items.desc_en: Higher productivity could be even more supportive of the stock market than previously thought.
items.desc_zh: 更高的生产率可能比之前想象的更能支持股市。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。

items.desc_en: It comes just a day after the firm revealed plans for a record-breaking stock market debut.
items.desc_zh: 就在一天前，该公司公布了破纪录的股票上市计划。

items.desc_zh: 对虚假约会资料的失望催生了采用不同方法的新约会服务。

items.title_en: UK police bosses urge unsafe platforms to be blocked for under-16s
items.title_zh: 英国警察局长敦促封锁 16 岁以下青少年的不安全平台
items.desc_en: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.
items.desc_zh: NCA 和 NPCC 表示，应该阻止儿童访问不能阻止他们看到裸体或与陌生人联系的网站。

items.desc_en: The trial had been set as a test case for 1200 other school districts making similar claims.
items.desc_zh: 该审判已被定为其他 1200 个做出类似主张的学区的测试案例。

items.title_en: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
items.title_zh: Ofcom 表示 TikTok 和 YouTube 对儿童来说“不够安全”
items.desc_en: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.
items.desc_zh: YouTube 表示，它与专家合作提供适当的体验。 TikTok 表示，对于 Ofcom 没有承认其安全功能感到失望。

items.title_en: SpaceX files for IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
items.title_zh: SpaceX 申请 IPO 可能使埃隆·马斯克成为万亿富翁
items.desc_en: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX
items.desc_zh: 马斯克的火箭制造商和卫星互联网提供商将以股票代码 SPCX 进行交易

items.title_en: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
items.title_zh: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
items.desc_en: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。

items.desc_zh: 这款眼镜将于秋季某个时候上市销售，让谷歌的人工智能产品能够与用户互动。
